purpose: Read a KC form's full schema + current answer state.

result.name: string
result.dataBindingKey: string (e.g. CASH, INVEST, AR — same as area code)
result.elements: JSON-ENCODED STRING — must json.loads. Layout array (HTML blocks, Tables, Tips, Paragraphs).
result.collections: JSON-ENCODED STRING — must json.loads. Array of {path, objectList} — the answer data.

field_decode_rules.answered: renderProperty.state == 3 AND renderProperty.isValueDefault == false. Fresh forms are state 0 everywhere.
field_decode_rules.default_state: state == 0 + isValueDefault == true means UNANSWERED — `value` may show recommendedAnswer, ignore it
field_decode_rules.field_kind_taxonomy: renderProperty.propertyType (int) is the field-kind discriminator, refined by floatieType + option-list length. 0=Answer(text if list empty / select if Radio / multiselect if CheckBox), 1=text(comment/description), 2=label(read-only Question/Name/HTML), 3=signoff(performedby/dates), 5=linked(system keys/IDs/cross-form values, read-only). Writable kinds: text, select, multiselect, signoff. See scripts.kc.classify_property / inventory_form.
field_decode_rules.floatieItemList_shape: ALWAYS an object {isCustomizable, list}, NEVER a bare array. Present on EVERY field, so presence != dropdown. Options are at floatieItemList.list; empty list = free text. Each item is {key, value, isCustom} — the item's KEY is the valueKey to send on write (verified: writing valueKey='yes' on a Yes/No field is accepted).
field_decode_rules.multiselect_write: CheckBox multiselect = one UpdateProperty POST, value + valueKey semicolon-joined, full-state replacement. Server normalizes a trailing semicolon off.
field_decode_rules.renderProperty_key_case: Inconsistent across forms (Question/question, Answer/answer). Match case-insensitively when reading. Preserve original case when writing back.
field_decode_rules.object_gating: objectList[i].visible is the tailoring-question gating flag. After writing a section TQ, re-read — the server recomputes visible on dependent rows. Don't write into visible:false rows.
